reviews.comment:
Un desastre no me quiso cobrar con la app porque dice que es sólo para combustibles cuando en los legales aclara que es para todo y siempre en otras yof me cobraron. Una billetera que es sólo para combustibles, ridículo! Si cargaba me cobraba por un lado el combustibles y por otro en festivo?  Impresentables, nunca más! Sólo se me ocurre que quieren probar a ver si pagas con tarjeta y te la clonan... Ojo! A tener cuidado en esta ypf!

(Translated by Google)
A disaster! They wouldn't charge me with the app because it says it's only for fuel, even though the official website clearly states it's for everything, and I've always been charged at other YPF stations. A wallet that's only for fuel? Ridiculous! If I filled up, they charged me for fuel separately and for holidays? Unbelievable, never again! The only thing I can think of is that they want to test if you pay by card and clone it... Watch out! Be careful at this YPF!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSenFxdld3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los muchachos super atentos y educados. Son expeditivos y siempre tienen todo limpio y en orden, da gusto ser socio del ACA. Las oficinas atienden hasta las 16h con seguridad. La recarga de aire es gratis y podes inflar bici si tenes válvula de auto

(Translated by Google)
The staff are incredibly attentive and polite. They're efficient and always keep everything clean and tidy; it's a pleasure being an ACA member. The offices are open until 4 PM with security. Air refills are free, and you can inflate bicycle tires if you have car valves.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURocnVLMml3RRAB
